Id1.text: Alaa Abdul-Zahra's clubs are the Shabab Al-Ordon Club and the Al-Zawra'a SC.

Id3.text: Alaa Abdul-Zahra's club is Shabab Al-Ordon Club and he formerly played for the club Al-Zawra'a SC.
